speaker: MATT
raw_text: I need you three to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: WILL
preceding_turns.text: Jeez.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Gonna get smackdown.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Your feet go out from under you as you slam onto your back, you just barely caught your breath before it's almost knocked out again. He's looking down at you this time, once again, his eyes just white. "Choose. Choose the two here who would save you."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (whispers) Pike's not here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Who would push you to your potential. Choose your bloody muses."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Does he mean us, or?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do they have to be here?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He looks over to the rest of you on the side of the pit. "Choose."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (sighs) I choose my buddy Pike.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: She's not here.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I don't care, I just say it anyway. I choose Vax and I choose Scanlan.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We give him his strength, sir.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you finish that sentence, two monks that you failed to notice were behind you shove both of you into the pit. Make acrobatics checks, both of you guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (laughing nervously) Not my kind of fight! Oh, I got a ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You tumble, catch Grog's arm, and lift him onto his feet as you land yourself at his side. Scanlan is face-down in the sand.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Are we talking still?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I would just like to point out that I am mostly sober.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Groon takes two steps back and just closes his eyes and puts his arms at his sides. "Now. Show me your conviction."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh snap!
